name: BenchCore Benchmark Feedback Policy
description: Rules governing feedback collection, processing, and use for the BenchCore benchmark pack.

implicit.description: Feedback inferred from user behavior (e.g., dwell time, click-through, correction patterns).

explicit.description: Feedback directly provided by the user (e.g., thumbs up/down, rating, explicit correction).

accepted.description: The user accepted the system's output or prediction.

rejected.description: The user rejected the system's output or prediction.

custom.description: The user provided a custom alternative or correction.

position_bias_correction.description: Each feedback event is reweighted by the inverse probability of the item being shown in that position.

smoothing.description: Small constant added to counts to avoid zero-probability estimates.
